signals.headline: BTC ETFs Record $471M Inflow | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BTC ETFs Record $471M Inflow | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin ETFs attracted $471 million in a single day, wiping out shorts and pushing BTC past $74,600 amid an Iran ceasefire collapsing oil prices, triggering $427 million in forced crypto selling.[1]

signals.headline: ETH Jumps 9% to $2,325 on Ceasefire Recovery | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH Jumps 9% to $2,325 on Ceasefire Recovery | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum traded near $2,325 after a 9% surge, outperforming majors, with the upcoming Glamsterdam upgrade in June set to boost Layer 2 scaling.[1]

signals.headline: SOL Rises 9% to $87
signals.raw:
SOL Rises 9% to $87.88 on Ceasefire & Network Records | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana hit $87.88 after a 9% gain, fueled by 167 million monthly token holders, 148 million daily non-vote transactions, and $650 billion in stablecoin volume; Alpenglow upgrade targets 150ms finality.[1][2]

signals.headline: SEC/CFTC Classify Digital Assets as Commodities, Boosting SOL | YES | MED confidence**
